## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Relay Financial team to GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing services and explore potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-augmented content creation with expert oversight, aiming for high-quality, efficient organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Relay Financial currently lacks consistent content production and sees opportunity in non-brand organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach combines AI workflows, expert input, and tailored strategies to produce in-depth, company-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in further discussions and exploring a potential pilot engagement](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Approach

  - [Utilizes AI workflows as code and a runtime layer for efficient content production](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Combines AI tools (e.g., Perplexity, ChatGPT, Google Surf APIs) with expert oversight for deep research and high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Process involves hundreds of steps, multiple workflows, and expert interventions for each piece of content](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Aims to replicate and scale expert-level research and writing processes](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Relay Financial's Current Content Situation

  - [Not producing content consistently due to team changes](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [In "rebuilding mode" for content production](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Seeing limited traction in non-brand organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Recognizes significant opportunity for improvement in organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

### Quality Assurance in AI-Assisted Content

  - [GrowthX emphasizes maintaining high quality through expert guidance and review throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Tailors content to each company's specific needs, personas, and product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Aims to improve upon traditional freelancer-based content creation by leveraging expert processes and AI augmentation](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)

### GrowthX's Team and Expertise

  - [Employs industry veterans from publications like TechCrunch and companies like Fanatics, ClickUp, and NerdWallet](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [Recently hired a new chief content officer (former editor-in-chief of TechCrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [Combines best practices from various domains to create comprehensive content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Relay Financial's Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competitors are traditional banks rather than direct fintech competitors](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Recently partnered with SoFi for business customer referrals](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Faces challenges in building awareness without outspending competitors](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)

### Future of Search and Content Marketing

  - [Discussed potential impact of AI on search engines and content discovery](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
  - [GrowthX's perspective: Focus on consistently being the best answer to customer questions, building trust, and adapting to changing content delivery methods](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send a sample proposal to Relay Financial](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up 30-minute call to address additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
  - [Add Relay Financial team to GrowthX's shared Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [Explore potential pilot engagement, noting GrowthX is booked through May for new client onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/g8WibyDqyM--zKyx3d3JcYgpsyTkBm8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
